summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Global Panel (S7) for WinDesk Market. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified Admin Global page loads with KPIs, tabs (Tenants, Orquestador, System Logs), tenants table with 5 rows and Lockdown/Activar buttons. Non-admin users correctly get 403 on admin endpoints and Admin Global link is hidden in sidebar.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/global-stats - Returns KPIs (active_tenants, running_vms, mrr, active_orders)
GET /api/admin/global-stats - Non-admin user gets 403
GET /api/admin/tenants - Returns list of 5 tenants with name, plan, vms, users, status, mrr
GET /api/admin/tenants - Non-admin user gets 403
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/lockdown - Suspends a tenant (status changes to 'suspended')
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/activate - Reactivates a tenant (status changes to 'activo')
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/lockdown - Non-admin user gets 403
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/activate - Non-admin user gets 403
GET /api/admin/orchestrator - Returns workers and queue
GET /api/admin/orchestrator - Non-admin user gets 403
GET /api/admin/system-logs - Returns log entries
GET /api/admin/system-logs - Non-admin user gets 403
Admin Global page /admin loads with title 'Admin Global'
Admin Global page shows 4 KPIs (Tenants activos, VMs corriendo, MRR, Órdenes activas)
Admin Global page has 3 tabs (Tenants y VMs, Orquestador, System Logs)
Tenants tab shows table with 5 rows and Lockdown buttons
Orquestador tab shows active orders with progress bars and workers list
System Logs tab shows log entries table
Sidebar shows 'Admin Global' link with NEW badge for admin users
Sidebar hides 'Admin Global' link for non-admin users
Lockdown button changes tenant status to 'suspended' with toast notification
Activar button changes tenant status to 'activo' with toast notification
Non-admin user accessing /admin sees 'Acceso denegado' toast and empty table
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: log_audit() function was undefined, changed to create_audit_log() in lockdown/activate endpoints
All admin endpoints properly check for admin role using require_admin() helper
Orchestrator workers and queue are MOCKED (simulated Celery workers)
Tenant data is seeded on first request to /api/admin/tenants
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: 5 demo tenants seeded on first request to /api/admin/tenants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Global Panel (S7) fully tested. All admin endpoints require role='admin'. Orchestrator workers and queue are MOCKED (not real Celery). Tenant lockdown/activate actions work correctly with toast notifications. Non-admin users are properly denied access with 403 and 'Acceso denegado' message.

mocked_apis.Celery workers status: Simulated 5 workers (provision@worker-1, provision@worker-2, winrm@worker-1, notify@worker-1, backup@worker-1)
mocked_apis.Provisioning queue: Simulated 2 orders in provisioning state with progress bars

bug_fixed.issue: log_audit() function was undefined in lockdown/activate endpoints
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to create_audit_log(user['id'], user['email'], action, resource, details)
